markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the Abnormal \<\> GrowthX partnership roadmap for the upcoming year.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Strategy:** Shift from a cautious approach to a high-volume, top-of-funnel (ToFu) "Education Hub" to drive traffic and enable efficient retargeting.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [**Empowered Execution:** GrowthX will own the Education Hub's wireframe and content strategy, bypassing internal committees to accelerate execution and optimize for performance.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [**Budget & Cadence:** The budget remains flat. The new cadence is \~15 Hub articles/week for volume and \~5 curated blog posts/week for high-intent conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [**New Requirement:** GrowthX must provide quarterly traffic forecasts to establish clear goals and track performance against the new strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)

## Topics

### Strategic Shift: From Caution to High-Volume Growth

  - [The partnership's new direction is enabled by Warren Duff's arrival, which unblocks a more aggressive content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
  - [**Goal:** Drive massive traffic ("eyeballs") to enable efficient retargeting of high-value accounts, optimizing spend on other programs.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Current site traffic is too low for a company of Abnormal's size.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)

### New Priority Order

1.  [**Education Hub:** Primary driver for ToFu traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
2.  [**AI Phishing Coach:** Promote a new product feature to the existing customer base.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
3.  [**Competitive Defense:** Create content to displace competitors like Darktrace.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
4.  [**Public Sector:** Grow a key vertical.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
5.  [**EMEA Expansion:** Increase regional awareness with English-language content.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)

### The "Education Hub": Execution Model

  - [**Concept:** A "glossary on steroids" for broad cybersecurity topics (e.g., "K-12 cybersecurity"), designed to be the first result for LLM and search queries.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [**Execution:** GrowthX will create the hub's wireframe and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Bypasses slow internal committees and brand reviews to accelerate execution and optimize for performance.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
      - [**Support:** Megan (CRO) will provide technical input on the CMS and implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [**Content Funnel:** Hub articles will internally link to Abnormal's product pages and blog posts, guiding users from awareness to conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)

### Content Cadence & Quality Control

  - [**Education Hub:** High-volume (\~15 articles/week) for traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)
  - [**Blog:** Slower, more deliberate pace (\~5 posts/week) for high-intent content.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)
  - [**Quality Control:** High-performing Hub articles will be reviewed by Emily or Yaro before being promoted to the blog.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=1883.0)
  - [**Risk Mitigation:** GrowthX must monitor organic traffic for diminishing returns. If traffic growth plateaus, the strategy will pivot from volume to CRO and content refinement.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)

### EMEA Strategy

  - [**Focus:** English-language content to support EMEA sales teams in displacing competitors like Darktrace.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
  - [**No Localization:** Translation is not a priority.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [**Future Possibility:** Translate top-performing English articles into local languages if data warrants.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=1919.0)
      - [Send a formal proposal next week detailing the new strategy and deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=1919.0)
      - [Include quarterly traffic forecasts in the proposal.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
      - [Develop wireframes for the Education Hub's main page and article template.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
  - [**Abnormal:**](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=1919.0)
      - [Review the proposal and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/3C1N71omVoDUqK3K_YmNCKzyTUq9P7xV?tab=summary&timestamp=1919.0)
